propositions: The old 'two green votes means it will land' model is broken because a conflict can block landing while votes stay green, so docs must teach the new contract to avoid silent babysitting.
Rewrite the landing section in CLAUDE.md and CONTRIBUTING.md to instruct agents to set Autosubmit / run land and act on the single typed outcome rather than watching votes.
Grep the whole repo for the deprecated 'two green votes' / 'watch votes' pattern and update all occurrences, not only CLAUDE.md and CONTRIBUTING.md.

Record the auto-lander design and rationale in docs/adr/0042, capturing the agent contract, R5 safety invariant, eight prior-art-grounded design decisions, separation-of-concerns boundary, reliability posture with accepted single-instance SPOF, and deferrals with promotion triggers.
Confirm both deferral idea ids resolve in the store and anchor ADR-0042 to them.
Docs must cross-reference ADR-0040 (FFO) and ADR-0041 (LLM-Review TRIVIAL_REBASE carry) as the gate substrate, and must not merge until S1's Autosubmit label and S4's land command are live.
